overview.heroBody: Live weather from the Observatory, air-quality readings from the EPD and MTR service notices — all in one place, refreshed every minute.

weather.title: Weather across Hong Kong
weather.description: Temperature readings from {{count}} HKO stations, with the daily UV index and humidity.

air.title: Air Quality Health Index (AQHI)
air.description: Hourly AQHI by general & roadside stations published by the Environmental Protection Department.

mtr.title: MTR service status
mtr.description: Live service status across MTR heavy-rail lines. Tap a line for hours and stations.

detail.empty: Select a line to see operating hours and the full station list.

bus.title: Bus & Minibus
bus.description: All KMB franchised routes and GMB green-minibus directory, live from data.gov.hk.
bus.truncated: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} — refine your search.
bus.selectHint: Select a route to see its stop sequence.
bus.selectRegion: Select a region to see its minibus route codes.
bus.selectRoute: Pick a route number to view its stops.

assistant.title: AI travel assistant
assistant.description: Powered by DeepSeek. Combines your origin and destination with live weather, AQHI and MTR status to recommend a route and what to pack.
assistant.toPlaceholder: e.g. Sha Tin / Tung Chung / The Peak

footer.built: Built with React + TypeScript · open-data via DATA.GOV.HK
